creator: lupe@lupe-christoph.de
text:
On Monday, 2008-08-11 at 04:17:22 +0800, Gea-Suan Lin wrote:

> Thanks for your suggestion.  I just found your patch in another PR.

... which it was an answer to ...

> On Sun, Aug 10, 2008 at 09:13:44PM +0200, Lupe Christoph wrote:

> > I still debate the necessity to use a scarce resource like a UID and a
> > GID for this port.

> Fixed uid/gid is an important issue in NIS or LDAP environment, since
> this port will install "munin" user to max UID available (by
> /usr/sbin/pw), it's possible to make conflict uid.

But both ports will accept a pre-existing UID and GID. So you just have
to make your own "munin" user and group and it will happily accept
those.

> The last one you mentioned, I think patch-Makefile should be updated
> because it will guarantee whatever version of /usr/bin/patch will work
> in this patch.  But I'm not insisted on this.  If all officially
> supported FreeBSD's patch working, that's ok to me.

It would probably be cleaner to update patch-Makefile.

> Anyway, nice work to update munin-*.

Thanks. I'm glad I have VMware back. It was rather disappointing not to
be able to work on this.

Lupe Christoph
